description: A maintenance planner schedules a 500-hour preventive maintenance service for a haul truck.

nodes.task_description: Run a report to identify all haul trucks approaching their 500-hour service interval.

expected_outcome.value: A list is generated showing truck HT-42 is at 490 hours.

nodes.task_description: Create a preventive maintenance work order in the CMMS for the 500-hour service on truck HT-42.

expected_outcome.value: A work order is generated, automatically populating the required service tasks.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the work order with the maintenance workshop for a specific date and time, coordinating with mine operations to release the truck.

expected_outcome.value: The maintenance is scheduled, and operations is notified to park the truck at the workshop.
